form.formComment: Scored by one length last time (16.51) in a Grade 5 over 300m at this track. Boasts three wins and four places from seven starts off the draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (23.26) over 400m at Gawler. Has a low draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (23.26) over 400m at Gawler. Has a low draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Comes off a (17.68) win last time, scoring by 2.25 lengths in a Grade 5 over 305m at Mt Gambier. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Makes appeal on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes off a (17.68) win last time, scoring by 2.25 lengths in a Grade 5 over 305m at Mt Gambier. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight in a handy (19.24), beating Bookaloo. Will find this a bit tougher, looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight in a handy (19.24), beating Bookaloo. Will find this a bit tougher, looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (16.70) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (16.70) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Will need some luck to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely checked and dragged down first turn.

form.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after leading to make it back-to-back wins at Murray Bridge Straight over 350m (19.65). Looks suited and should go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after leading to make it back-to-back wins at Murray Bridge Straight over 350m (19.65). Looks suited and should go close again.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th on April 15 over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight behind Stifler beaten 4.5 lengths (17.14) in a Invitation. Placed two back at Murray Bridge Straight. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
